hero.lead: TouchPulse turns any building or street into a clear, confident path — powered by Tiera AI and real human backup.
hero.proofLine: 2.4M routes completed. Real people. Real independence.

ctaBanner.heading: Be part of building something that matters.
ctaBanner.body: Whether you join now or wait for December — your involvement makes Tiera better for everyone who needs it.
ctaBanner.earlyAccessMessage: I'd like early access to the Tiera development app.
ctaBanner.waitlistMessage: I'd like to join the waitlist for the December Tiera launch.
